title: Best Law College in Delhi NCR & Noida – Galgotias Univ
content: Funded Projects Publication WOS/Scopus Student Publication Patent Published/Granted Centre of Excellence Galgotias University's School of Law (GUSOL) is a prime example of how strong traditions, state-of-the-art infrastructure, and an excellent curriculum can pave the way for a top-notch educational institution. Established just a decade ago, GUSOL has made significant strides in the legal education landscape of India by providing skill-oriented and industry-relevant programs. The School of Law's focus on producing litigation specialists, corporate lawyers, mediation & arbitration experts, professionals to draft legal instruments, policymakers, researchers, academicians, diplomats, comparative law experts for the burgeoning LPO industry, and others have helped GUSOL gain prominence as one of the best law schools in India. In simply a decade of its foundation, The School of Law, Galgotias University, has emerged at the 3rd in UP and 11th in India by India Today-MDRA survey 2023 and has earned the 2nd spot in UP in the category of eminent law schools in India. With laser like focus on quality legal education, practical advocacy skills development and experiential learning, for the second year in a row, the School of Law, Galgotias University retained its 3rd position nationally in the India Today MDRA Survey 2022 to become an institution to reckon with. The department of legal studies is a continual work in progress with 50 regular faculty and over 1200 legal eagles making the most of the academic environment and world class infrastructural amenities. Legal education plays a crucial role in nation-building, and the School of Law at Galgotias University recognizes its significance. The Constitution of India's basic feature is the rule of law, and quality legal education is essential to facilitate it. Hence, the School of Law was established to provide quality legal education to the youth and make them understand the relevance and significance of democratic values. GUSOL's world-class infrastructure includes a well-stocked library with thousands of books, academic and reporting journals, and other reference materials. The students can access online legal databases via the campus's Wi-Fi facility. The classrooms are equipped with LCD projectors and other IT tools for education, and a spacious auditorium serves the needs of various seminars, conferences, and events. The Moot Court Hall provides practical courtroom lessons to the students. GUSOL has been a pioneer in grooming modern-day legal professionals with a multi-disciplinary edge since its inception in 2012. The undergraduate and postgraduate programs offered at GUSOL have a contemporary and progressive curriculum that integrates law concepts with current industry needs. The integrated BA LL.B (Hons), BBA LL.B (Hons) programs with specializations in Corporate Laws, Intellectual Property Law, Criminal Law, and Constitutional Law address the industry's current needs, state, society, and individuals. The 360-degree approach to learning at GUSOL focuses on imparting strong subject-matter expertise (through classroom learning) and top-notch practical exposure (through internships, moot courts, and court visits) to all its incumbents. In addition to the highly accomplished full-time faculty, students also learn from experienced visiting faculty and renowned legal practitioners. GUSOL students since the first graduating batch of 2012-2017 have been well accepted in top legal firms, government organizations, and MNCs of repute. The School has over the years provided excellence in legal education and has been ranked very high by various ranking agencies, making its mark in the map of national rankings of brilliance among others.@ GUSOL students have consistently outperformed and won national awards in a short span of ten years. Recent graduates are holding important jobs in India and abroad and demonstrating in their work environments the moral and professional standards they acquired while studying at GALGOTIAS University's School of Law. In conclusion, Galgotias University's School of Law is an exceptional institution that has established itself as one of the top law schools in India in just ten years. Its emphasis on skill-oriented education, industry-relevant curriculum, quality research, outreach activities, and placement facilitation has enabled it to produce exceptional legal professionals who have made their mark in India and abroad. As the need for specialized legal professionals grows, GUSOL is the right place to acquire those skills and establish a successful career in the legal field.
